tool_args.label: NYC Transit Title VI Most Cited Basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis was Race
payload.description: Title VI and Related Discrimination complaints by Bases (January 1, 2025 – December 31, 2025): Age 1, Color 0, Disability 7, National Origin 9, Race 17, Religion 2, Sex 5

tool_args.label: NYC Transit Title VII Most Cited Basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently singularly-cited basis was Retaliation
payload.description: Internal and External Complaints by Bases (January 1, 2025 – December 31, 2025): Retaliation 18 Internal/20 External, Sexual Harassment 21/0, Race/Color 26/8, Gender 8/10, Age 6/4, Disability 3/23, National Origin 5/7, Religion 2/1, Other 15/9

tool_args.label: MTABUS Title VI Most Cited Basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis was Disability
payload.description: Title VI and Related Discrimination complaints by Bases (January 1, 2025 – December 31, 2025): Disability 4, Race 3, Religion 1, Age 0, Color 0, National Origin 0, Sex 0

tool_args.label: MTABUS Title VII Most Cited Basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently singularly-cited basis was Gender and Race/Color
payload.description: Internal and External Complaints by Bases (January 1, 2025 – December 31, 2025): Race/Color 3/0, Gender 2/1, National Origin 2/0, Other 1/1, Disability 0/1, Retaliation 1/0, Sexual Harassment 1/0, Age 0/0, Religion 0/0
B.E.G.I.N. invited members to a networking and pre-holiday celebration at Public House and Kitchen

tool_args.label: All Generational MNR Train Module Workshop

payload.description: All Generational continued Train Module building workshops at MTA Headquarters (2 Broadway), MTA employees built sections of an operating model railroad, culminating in a public exhibition
payload.event_name: All Generational: MNR Train Module Workshop & Exhibition (2 Broadway)

payload.description: All Generational invited members to a Holiday Get Together to celebrate diverse cultural year end traditions and reflect on accomplishments in 2025
Latinos & Friends hosted Hector Garcia, LIRR Chief of Staff – President's Office, for a Cafecito Chat
payload.event_name: Latinos & Friends: Cafecito Chat with Hector Garcia

payload.description: All Generational continued Train Module building workshops at LIRR-Hillside working on a LIRR Dual-Mode locomotive, with exhibition
payload.event_name: All Generational: Train Module Workshop & Exhibition (LIRR-Hillside)

payload.description: B.E.G.I.N.'s Black History Month celebration centered on the 2026 theme 'A Century of Black History', featuring multimedia presentations, soloist performance, and poetry readings
payload.event_name: B.E.G.I.N. A Celebration of the Culture: A Century of Black History

payload.description: Young Professionals ERG hosted its second Professional Speed Networking event for ERG members and MTA employees

tool_args.label: MTA Strategic Priority - Revive Talent and Culture

payload.claim_text: Employee Resource Groups (ERGs) are important pillars of the MTA and contribute to a culture of inclusion and belonging while making a positive impact on the MTA. All initiatives and programs should serve and champion members, maximize available resources, align with the MTA strategic priorities as well as the ERG goals and objectives.
payload.description: MTA Strategic Priority – Revive Talent and Culture
The Metropolitan Transportation Authority Department of Diversity and Civil Rights prepared the progress report
